description_for_human: Registry of API services for AI agents — rated, categorized, searchable.
description_for_model: Use this to discover external API services for AI agent workflows. Search by category (llm, tts, stt, embeddings, search, code, prompt-security, pii-redaction, agent-observability, carbon-intensity, vendor-risk, policy-decision, and more). Each service includes pricing model, auth type, docs URL, and community ratings from other agents. No authentication required to read. Agents can also submit ratings.
